title: 向虚拟机注入鼠标输入
title_en: Inject Mouse Input into a Virtual Machine
code:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function W([string]$p){ New-Object System.Management.ManagementObject($p) }
function Wait-Job2([string]$p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=W $p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=W $p; $j.Get()}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=@(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService)[0]
# 1) 创建第二代测试虚拟机
$vssd=([wmiclass]("\\.\"+$ns+":Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData")).CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_mouse_input'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null); if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r.Job|Out-Null}
$vm=W $r.ResultingSystem; $vm.Get()
# 2) 鼠标设备(Msvm_SyntheticMouse)仅在虚拟机运行时存在; 停止态实例数为 0
#    须先 RequestStateChange(2) 启动到 EnabledState=2
$vmc=W $vm.__PATH; $vmc.Get(); $rs=$vmc.RequestStateChange(2); if($rs.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $rs.Job|Out-Null}
Start-Sleep -Seconds 3
# 3) 按 SystemName=VM.Name(GUID) 取 Msvm_SyntheticMouse (第二代; 第一代用 Msvm_Ps2Mouse)
$mouse=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_SyntheticMouse -Filter ("SystemName='"+$vm.Name+"'")|Select-Object -First 1
$mouse=W $mouse.__PATH; $mouse.Get()
# 4) 注入(均返回 uint32, 0=成功; 需来宾装有 Hyper-V 鼠标集成驱动):
$mouse.SetAbsolutePosition([int]32768,[int]32768).ReturnValue   # 绝对定位: 归一化坐标 0..65535, (0,0)左上 (65535,65535)右下
$mouse.ClickButton([uint32]1).ReturnValue                       # 按键点击(按下-抬起): 1=左 2=右 3=中
$mouse.SetScrollPosition([int]120).ReturnValue                  # 滚轮相对增量: +向上 -向下 (一格=120)
# 5) 清理: 先强制关机 RequestStateChange(3) 再 DestroySystem
$vmk=W $vm.__PATH; $vmk.Get(); $off=$vmk.RequestStateChange(3); if($off.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $off.Job|Out-Null}
$d=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $d.Job|Out-Null}
code_en:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function W([string]$p){ New-Object System.Management.ManagementObject($p) }
function Wait-Job2([string]$p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=W $p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=W $p; $j.Get()}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=@(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService)[0]
# 1) Create a Generation 2 test virtual machine
$vssd=([wmiclass]("\\.\"+$ns+":Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData")).CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_mouse_input'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null); if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r.Job|Out-Null}
$vm=W $r.ResultingSystem; $vm.Get()
# 2) The mouse device (Msvm_SyntheticMouse) exists only while the VM is running; in the stopped state the instance count is 0
#    RequestStateChange(2) must first be issued to start the VM to EnabledState=2
$vmc=W $vm.__PATH; $vmc.Get(); $rs=$vmc.RequestStateChange(2); if($rs.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $rs.Job|Out-Null}
Start-Sleep -Seconds 3
# 3) Retrieve Msvm_SyntheticMouse by SystemName=VM.Name(GUID) (Generation 2; Generation 1 uses Msvm_Ps2Mouse)
$mouse=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_SyntheticMouse -Filter ("SystemName='"+$vm.Name+"'")|Select-Object -First 1
$mouse=W $mouse.__PATH; $mouse.Get()
# 4) Injection (all return uint32, 0=success; requires the Hyper-V mouse integration driver installed in the guest):
$mouse.SetAbsolutePosition([int]32768,[int]32768).ReturnValue   # Absolute positioning: normalized coordinates 0..65535, (0,0) top-left (65535,65535) bottom-right
$mouse.ClickButton([uint32]1).ReturnValue                       # Button click (press-release): 1=left 2=right 3=middle
$mouse.SetScrollPosition([int]120).ReturnValue                  # Relative scroll wheel delta: + up - down (one notch=120)
# 5) Cleanup: first force shutdown with RequestStateChange(3), then DestroySystem
$vmk=W $vm.__PATH; $vmk.Get(); $off=$vmk.RequestStateChange(3); if($off.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $off.Job|Out-Null}
$d=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $d.Job|Out-Null}
output:
vsms path=...Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService...Name="vmms"
VM created: WMITEST_mouse_input Name=EEAE6494-9DE9-45C9-A7F9-BB8EB3D52023 EnabledState=3
SyntheticMouse while STOPPED: count=0
RequestStateChange(2 Enabled) rv=4096
  start job final JobState=7
EnabledState after start attempt=2
Mouse found: ...Msvm_SyntheticMouse.DeviceID="Microsoft:58F75A6D-D949-4320-99E1-A2A2576D581C",SystemName="EEAE6494-..."
SetAbsolutePosition(32768,32768) -> 32773
SetAbsolutePosition(0,0) -> 32768
SetAbsolutePosition(65535,65535) -> 32773
ClickButton(1 left) -> 32768
ClickButton(2 right) -> 32768
ClickButton(3 middle) -> 32768
SetScrollPosition(120) -> 32768
SetScrollPosition(-120) -> 32768
MOUSE-INJECT=REJECTED (no guest mouse driver on empty VM; codes recorded)
FINAL=PASS
CLEANUP force-off rv=4096
CLEANUP DestroySystem rv=4096
RESIDUAL=NO
notes: 前置条件：Msvm_SyntheticMouse 设备仅在虚拟机运行态(EnabledState=2)时存在，停止态(EnabledState=3)下该虚拟机的 Msvm_SyntheticMouse 实例数为 0。因此需先 RequestStateChange(2) 启动虚拟机(空的第二代 UEFI 虚拟机即可启动)才能取得鼠标设备并调用其方法。该模式与键盘输入(Msvm_Keyboard)一致。

获取鼠标设备：Get-WmiObject Msvm_SyntheticMouse -Filter "SystemName='<VM.Name GUID>'"，须使用 VM.Name(GUID)而非 ElementName。第二代为 Msvm_SyntheticMouse，第一代为 Msvm_Ps2Mouse(方法集少一个 SetAbsolutePosition)。合成鼠标 DeviceID 固定为 Microsoft:58F75A6D-D949-4320-99E1-A2A2576D581C。

方法签名(均返回 uint32, ValueMap: 0=成功 4096=作业 32768..32778=各类失败)：SetAbsolutePosition(sint32 HorizontalPosition, sint32 VerticalPosition) 绝对归一化坐标 0..65535；ClickButton(uint32 ButtonIndex) 1=左 2=右 3=中，执行一次按下-抬起；SetScrollPosition(sint32 ScrollPositionDelta) 滚轮相对增量(一格=120)。SetAbsolutePosition 为鼠标相对键盘的关键差异——键盘无此绝对定位方法。

在空 UEFI 第二代虚拟机(无来宾操作系统)上，三个方法均返回非零：SetAbsolutePosition 返回 32773(Invalid Parameter，边界值 0/65535 及 32768 均拒绝)，ClickButton/SetScrollPosition 返回 32768(Failed)。原因是空虚拟机停在 UEFI/PXE，来宾侧无 Hyper-V 鼠标集成驱动打开 VMBus 鼠标通道，合成鼠标拒绝注入。返回 0 需来宾装有集成服务鼠标驱动(启动 Windows/Linux 后)。这是设备状态限制，而非调用错误；设备定位与方法调用本身有效。

主机稳定性提示：某些 vmms.exe 版本在空虚拟机快速创建/启动/删除的高频操作下可能崩溃(事件 ID 1000/1001，异常 0xc0000409 STATUS_STACK_BUFFER_OVERRUN)，崩溃后 root\virtualization\v2 命名空间所有查询返回空(vmms 服务处于 Stopped)。脚本可加入守护逻辑：每次 WMI 调用前确认服务在运行并能取到 Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService，否则启动 vmms 并重试；清理前同样先确认服务可用，以保证崩溃后仍能删除测试虚拟机。

PowerShell 5.1 兼容性：[wmi] 类型加速器解析路径在 vmms 抖动期偶发 InvalidCast，改用 New-Object System.Management.ManagementObject($path) 再 .Get() 更稳定。Get-WmiObject Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService 以 @(...)[0] 或 Select -First 1 取值，为空时重试。
清理：先强制关机 RequestStateChange(3) 再 DestroySystem；DestroySystem 返回 4096(作业)须 Wait-Job2 等待完成，且删除存在延迟，应轮询直到 ElementName='WMITEST_mouse_input' 查询为空以确认无残留。
notes_en: Precondition: the Msvm_SyntheticMouse device exists only while the VM is running (EnabledState=2); in the stopped state (EnabledState=3) the VM's Msvm_SyntheticMouse instance count is 0. The VM must therefore first be started via RequestStateChange(2) (an empty Generation 2 UEFI VM is sufficient to start) before the mouse device can be obtained and its methods invoked. This pattern is identical to keyboard input (Msvm_Keyboard).

Obtaining the mouse device: Get-WmiObject Msvm_SyntheticMouse -Filter "SystemName='<VM.Name GUID>'", using VM.Name (GUID) rather than ElementName. Generation 2 uses Msvm_SyntheticMouse, Generation 1 uses Msvm_Ps2Mouse (its method set lacks SetAbsolutePosition). The synthetic mouse DeviceID is fixed at Microsoft:58F75A6D-D949-4320-99E1-A2A2576D581C.

Method signatures (all return uint32, ValueMap: 0=success, 4096=job, 32768..32778=various failures): SetAbsolutePosition(sint32 HorizontalPosition, sint32 VerticalPosition) uses absolute normalized coordinates 0..65535; ClickButton(uint32 ButtonIndex) 1=left 2=right 3=middle, performing a single press-release; SetScrollPosition(sint32 ScrollPositionDelta) is a relative scroll wheel delta (one notch=120). SetAbsolutePosition is the key difference of the mouse relative to the keyboard—the keyboard has no such absolute positioning method.

On an empty UEFI Generation 2 VM (with no guest operating system), all three methods return non-zero: SetAbsolutePosition returns 32773 (Invalid Parameter, rejecting even the boundary values 0/65535 and 32768), and ClickButton/SetScrollPosition return 32768 (Failed). The cause is that the empty VM is halted at UEFI/PXE, with no Hyper-V mouse integration driver on the guest side to open the VMBus mouse channel, so the synthetic mouse rejects injection. Returning 0 requires the integration services mouse driver installed in the guest (after booting Windows/Linux). This is a device-state limitation, not a call error; device location and the method invocations themselves are valid.

Host stability note: some versions of vmms.exe may crash under high-frequency create/start/delete operations on empty VMs (event ID 1000/1001, exception 0xc0000409 STATUS_STACK_BUFFER_OVERRUN); after the crash all queries in the root\virtualization\v2 namespace return empty (the vmms service is Stopped). Scripts may add guard logic: before every WMI call, confirm the service is running and that Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService can be retrieved, otherwise start vmms and retry; likewise confirm the service is available before cleanup, so that test VMs can still be deleted after a crash.

PowerShell 5.1 compatibility: the [wmi] type accelerator resolving a path occasionally raises InvalidCast during vmms instability; using New-Object System.Management.ManagementObject($path) followed by .Get() is more stable. Retrieve Get-WmiObject Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService via @(...)[0] or Select -First 1, and retry when empty.

Cleanup: first force shutdown with RequestStateChange(3), then DestroySystem; DestroySystem returns 4096 (job) and must be awaited to completion with Wait-Job2, and since deletion has a delay, poll until the ElementName='WMITEST_mouse_input' query returns empty to confirm no residual.
